ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the athlete */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the athlete */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the athlete */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach assigned to the athlete */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the athlete in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the athlete in kilograms */,
  "training_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training group the athlete belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the coach */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the coach (e.g., swimming, biking) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event takes place */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the event */,
  "distance" TEXT /* Distance of the event (e.g., Sprint, Olympic) */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event category */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions on the event day */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organizer of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete who participated */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event in which the athlete participated */,
  "swim_time" TEXT /* Time taken to complete the swimming segment */,
  "bike_time" TEXT /* Time taken to complete the biking segment */,
  "run_time" TEXT /* Time taken to complete the running segment */,
  "transition_time_1" TEXT /* Time taken for the first transition */,
  "transition_time_2" TEXT /* Time taken for the second transition */,
  "total_time" TEXT /* Total time taken to complete the event */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Average heart rate during the event */,
  "calories_burned" INTEGER /* Estimated calories burned during the event */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used by the athlete (e.g., bike model) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_records_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_records_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete for whom metrics are calculated */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "average_swim_time" TEXT /* Average time taken for swimming over events */,
  "average_bike_time" TEXT /* Average time taken for biking over events */,
  "average_run_time" TEXT /* Average time taken for running over events */,
  "best_performance" TEXT /* Best performance time in the recorded events */,
  "improvement_rate" REAL /* Rate of improvement over time */,
  "rank_in_event" INTEGER /* Rank of the athlete in the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lap_times" (
  "lap_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lap record */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete completing the lap */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the training session */,
  "lap_number" INTEGER /* Lap number in the training session */,
  "lap_time" TEXT /* Time taken to complete the lap */,
  "lap_type" TEXT /* Type of lap (e.g., swim, bike, run) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lap_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lap_times_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the event category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "average_duration" TEXT /* Average duration for events in this category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., athlete, coach, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
